# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: LinkerdConfiguration
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: default
spec:
  linkerdResources: false # set this to true if you want to control the creation of Linkerd's own resources (like the ClusterRoles, ClusterRoleBindings etc)
  proxy:
    enableExternalProfiles: false
    image:
      ref: "gcr.io/linkerd-io/proxy:latest" # or replace with your preferred version
      pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  controlPlane:
    replicas: 3
  webhook:
    timeoutSeconds: 5
    failurePolicy: Fail # Ignore, Fail
    match: # which namespaces and/or resources to apply the validation rule. This allows for more fine-grained settings by selecting individual Namespaces, Kubernetes resources or even individual fields within a resource type.
      kind: Pod
  server:
    enabled: true
    enableH2Upgrade: false # If set, adds an HTTP to HTTPS upgrade header. This only affects responses from the Linkerd control plane and proxies are not configured with this option.
    inject: |
      asdasdsad
